privileged_info_summary: The expected CSV and experiment paths are /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/gad7_items.csv and /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/gad7_assessment.psyexp respectively. The 7 GAD-7 items are correctly defined per the standard psychological assessment tool and task description. The slider labels ('Not at all', 'Several days', 'More than half the days', 'Nearly every day') and ticks ([0, 1, 2, 3]) accurately match the task requirements.
